message:
🐛 Suppress failure issue creation for all gh-aw workflows

Added report-failure-as-issue: false to auto-triage, handle-complications,
stuck-detection, and verify-preview (implement-fix already had it).
These workflows create noise [aw] failure issues when they fire
redundantly alongside direct Copilot assignment.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@
 # For more information: https://github.github.com/gh-aw/introduction/overview/
 #
 #
-# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"f52408ba56e8d8fdc43a7932e716f817370260f62b72a20dd0491c222b259123","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
+# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"2f72fc34ce791c2611483deca064e17505135d0cea6d81cee1f947532e3c6732","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
 
 name: "Auto-Triage on Copilot Assignment"
 "on":
@@ -1002,7 +1002,7 @@ jobs:
           GH_AW_CHECKOUT_PR_SUCCESS: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.checkout_pr_success }}
           GH_AW_INFERENCE_ACCESS_ERROR: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.inference_access_error }}
           GH_AW_GROUP_REPORTS: "false"
-          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "true"
+          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "false"
           GH_AW_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: "20"
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ on:
     types: [assigned]
 
 safe-outputs:
+  report-failure-as-issue: false
   add-labels:
     max: 3
 ---

@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@
 # For more information: https://github.github.com/gh-aw/introduction/overview/

-# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"ffa1784d57f580e7e0c22ac8bc5d83c7f94acb704c3505f18cbb9514e2cf5340","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
+# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"9cd33a41be95dd6256619dba4ba44685f9e6a7d369eb76ab2abd3b16898825e2","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
 
 name: "Complication Handler Workflow"
 "on":
@@ -1075,7 +1075,7 @@ jobs:
           GH_AW_CHECKOUT_PR_SUCCESS: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.checkout_pr_success }}
           GH_AW_INFERENCE_ACCESS_ERROR: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.inference_access_error }}
           GH_AW_GROUP_REPORTS: "false"
-          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "true"
+          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "false"
           GH_AW_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: "20"
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ on:
     types: [created]
 
 safe-outputs:
+  report-failure-as-issue: false
   add-comment:
     max: 5
   add-labels:

@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@
 # For more information: https://github.github.com/gh-aw/introduction/overview/

-# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"90719d3ac51f4d1a7394774e386d51d247ab27c87175cb7df473a9df7f7352d8","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}

 name: "Stuck Detection Workflow"
 "on":

           GH_AW_CHECKOUT_PR_SUCCESS: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.checkout_pr_success }}
           GH_AW_INFERENCE_ACCESS_ERROR: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.inference_access_error }}
           GH_AW_GROUP_REPORTS: "false"
-          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "true"
+          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "false"
           GH_AW_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: "20"
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ on:
         default: "false"
 
 safe-outputs:
+  report-failure-as-issue: false
   add-comment:
     max: 5
   add-labels:

 # For more information: https://github.github.com/gh-aw/introduction/overview/

-# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"597940338f8895216346c8998a473f45bf33d0869913e473ba8da3fec9d30b78","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
+# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"00257d51a3cca94c3aab17ba1b060028e07d6e94b0db97fcfadbb35b08fb836c","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
 
 name: "Preview Verification Workflow"
 "on":
@@ -1053,7 +1053,7 @@ jobs:
           GH_AW_CHECKOUT_PR_SUCCESS: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.checkout_pr_success }}
           GH_AW_INFERENCE_ACCESS_ERROR: ${{ needs.agent.outputs.inference_access_error }}
           GH_AW_GROUP_REPORTS: "false"
-          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "true"
+          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "false"
           GH_AW_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: "20"
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ on:
         required: true
 
 safe-outputs:
+  report-failure-as-issue: false
   add-comment:
     max: 5
   add-labels:
